notes: Defined in switching_alignment_audit energy-scale collapse plot construction; only I_peak and S_peak are required for curve inclusion.
Defined in switching_alignment_audit threshold-collapse test (shift only, no width and no amplitude normalization).
Collapse axes are width-free, but temperature inclusion uses width_missing and peak-at-lowest-current rules from decision table.
Width is explicit in the axis and computed by FWHM with sigma fallback before interpolation and metric evaluation.
